expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Explicitly separates RP business side from personal side, notes 'lens does not touch personal accounts'

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Clear recommendation 'Buy the lens' with three conditions and log-as-capital-equipment instruction

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: Stays specific to numbers; 'runway' is contextual not generic lecture

expectations.text: Gives a clear yes/no/it-depends answer with specific reasoning from the numbers
expectations.evidence: 'Yes, comfortably' with cash-on-hand %, 3.5x remaining buffer, worst-case stress test

expectations.text: Addresses the business-expense angle (tax deductibility) since it's through RP
expectations.evidence: 'Tax-deductible (Section 179 or depreciated), not personal discretionary spending'
